title: OIG LEIE excluded providers in NDH
notes: Pre-registration record. The match logic — NPI-keyed inner join between active LEIE rows (NPI != '0000000000', REINDATE = '00000000') and NDH practitioner._npi / organization._npi — is published before any results drop. The 89% of LEIE rows without a populated NPI are not addressable by AINPI's NPI-keyed methodology. Numbers populate when `analysis/ingest_oig_leie.py` and `analysis/h24_oig_exclusions.py` run against the pinned NPD release. Each match is a data-quality flag aligned with 42 CFR § 455.436, NOT a fraud determination.
